evidence: "Easily in the top ten of best cop shows ever."
"A good cast and bam, bam, bam pacing make it watchable."
"The pace is fast, the casting/acting first rate."
"Crisp writing, perfect casting and high production values make this series a cut above."
"High production values and attention to detail, along with a plausible story line make this a Five Star series."
"Thank you Amazon Prime for adding this David E. Kelly masterpiece to your lineup."
"Stephen Bochco set a new television standard when he made this show."
"Beautifully shot, the setting is perfect for the film."
"Absolutely Brilliant! A heady, sophisticated drama/comedy that causes grown men to weep."
"Everything about Six Feet Under is 5 Star: writing, story lines, photography, high production values and a great cast."

summary: The user has a strong preference for crime and drama genres, particularly enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They exhibit loyalty to notable creators like Steven Bochco and David E. Kelly, and their reviews reflect a high emotional engagement with the content they consume.
